name: Michael Rogers
stanceSummary: Rogers has publicly supported expanded military backing for Israel, defended Israel's right to respond to Iranian and proxy threats, and framed policy disputes around Gaza aid operations through a security-first lens.

timeline.event: Rogers urged the administration to halt the Gaza pier operation and shift to alternative aid delivery methods, citing military risk and limited throughput.
After Iran's attack on Israel, Rogers said Israel has the right to defend itself against Iran and its terrorist proxies and called for continued U.S. military support.
